titleStmt.title: SII 9.384: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 384. (A.R. No. 718 of 1919.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SUNKALAMMA TEMPLE AT NERANIKI, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 17th year of the reign of the Yādava king Rāmachandradēva, Śaka 1209, Śarvajitu, Srāvaṇa, śu. 15, Guruvāra corresponding to A.D. 1287 July 24 Friday, not Thursday, the 15th tithi commencing about midday on Friday. It records that Dēva-Rāṇeya, who was administering (Sindavāḍi-nāḍu ?) granted Nāgaya-Nāyaka, son of Srīkaṇṭha-Nāyaka, four villages viz., Nēralike, Beṁbuguḍi, Arakeṟe and Hoḷalugunda as vṛitti and that the chief Seṭṭis of Tuṁbuḷapaṭṭaṇa granted a cess of 2 paṇas on every load of ten bullocks to the Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyāviṣkrutirbbiṣṇōrvārāhaṁ śōbhitārnnavaṁ .
dakṣiṇōnnatadamṣṭrāgrē viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ va
puḥ . viṣṇōryaṣṇōstu lōkēṣu bhrajiṣṇōryatta
saṁbhavaḥ . dugudhāṁbudhāyiva caṁdrasya sa jīvā
dyādavānvayaḥ . svasti śrīśakavaruṣa 1209 ṟa yāda
vanārāyaṇa bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratāpacakravartti śrī
rāmacaṁdradēvavijayarāyarājyābhyudayada hadi
nēḷaneya sarvvajitusaṁvacharada śravaṇa śuddha 15 mi
guruvāradaṁdu tatpadmōpajīvi rāya śatnu dēvarāṇeya
ru sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgaivutta svasti śrīmanumahānā
ynācāryanēkāṁgavīra vīrāvatāra Āstivarasvayaṁ
bhu khaṁḍēyarāya nirbhbhayanātha svayaṁbhusaṁga
mēsvarādēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakanuma
ppa śrīkaṁṭhayanāykana maga nāgeyanāykage siṁda
vāḍināḍa sa(ṁ)mmaṁdhadalli vrittiyāgi koṭṭa grāmaga
ḷu nēraḷike beṁbuguḍi Arakeṟe hoḷaluguṁda Ēvaṁ grāma
�ḷanu . svasti samastabhuvanavikhyātapaṁcaśatavīraśāsanala
budhānēkaguṇagaṇālaṁkritarumappa śrīvīranārāya
ṇapura tuṁbuḷapaṭaṇada vubhayanānādēsiyarige mu
khyarappa seṭṭigutti ruddiseṭṭi savudore sōyiseṭṭi hega
ḍe malliseṭṭi paṭaṇasāmi kāsebiseṭṭi vūbheya
mārggada guḍḍa galiseṭṭiyara maga dēviseṭṭiyaru doḍā
la nāgiseṭṭiyaru mukhyavāgi samastahalaru koṭṭa
vritti Ānupu Ettu 10 kke Ippaṇava koṭṭaru .
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānachva
rggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . krutvā gōkō
ṭivadhāmaśnutē karanirbhbhaṣaṇaṁ krutvā gōkōṭiphalama
śnutē . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ
śaṣṭirbaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyaṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ . sukhadali bhōgisuvanu maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
śivaṁṇaṁgaḷa maga śrīpatidēva baruda śāsana
maṁgaḷa . śrīkalināthamukhyavāgi sthānamā
nya pūrvvamariyāde maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ
mukhyavāgiAt the top of the inscription are written: muliga kalappa samakṣavāgi
Digital edition of SII 9.384 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
